positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical design featuring a majestic, glowing astronaut flora silhouette floating within a cosmic nebula. The central element is a bioluminescent cosmic sunflower with intricate, crystalline petals, surrounded by floating rings of geometric, geometric nebula dust. The colors should be vibrant deep indigo, electric cyan, neon magenta, and glowing gold. The composition must be clean, suitable for a high-contrast print on apparel, emphasizing strong silhouettes and radial symmetry. Vector art style with photorealistic light bleeding. Central focus, minimal negative space, 8K resolution, designed for DTG printing.
negative: low quality, blurry, distorted, noise, watermark, text, signature, out of frame, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, jpeg artifacts, messy, grunge, realism, logo, lettering, trademark
